name: ecology
description: Claude plugins for the ESA Ecology design system — the hub-owned intelligence layer that spokes install instead of copying.

plugins.name: spoke-kit
plugins.description: Everything Claude needs in an Ecology spoke: the component-first skill + enforcement hook, /spoke-init scaffolding, and the spoke pre-commit review.

plugins.name: migrate-kit
plugins.description: The spoke-driven Ecology migration suite for existing Angular apps: a human-gated conductor over audit/plan, shell (header→sidebar), component, page, and verify stages — driven by the app's design spoke, Beacon, and the hub token contract.
